title: Anti-HBG1/2 Rabbit Monoclonal Antibody
short_description: Anti-HBG1/2 Rabbit Monoclonal Antibody. Tested in WB.
description: Boster Bio Anti-HBG1/2 Rabbit Monoclonal Antibody catalog # M02830. Tested in WB. Reacts with Human.
storage: Store at -20°C for one year. For short term, at 4°C for up to one month.

title: Anti-β-Actin Mouse Monoclonal Antibody
short_description: Loading control antibody for western blot and IHC.
description: Monoclonal antibody against β-actin for use as a loading control in western blotting and immunohistochemistry.
storage: Store at -20°C. Avoid repeated freeze-thaw cycles.

title: Anti-GAPDH Rabbit Polyclonal Antibody
short_description: Polyclonal GAPDH antibody for western blot loading control.
description: Rabbit polyclonal antibody raised against GAPDH. Suitable for western blot as a housekeeping protein control.
storage: Store at -20°C for up to one year.

title: Anti-CD3ε Rabbit Monoclonal Antibody
short_description: CD3 epsilon marker for T cells — IHC and flow cytometry.
description: Rabbit monoclonal antibody to CD3ε for immunohistochemistry and flow cytometry applications on human samples.
storage: Store at -20°C. Protect from light if conjugated.

title: Anti-Apolipoprotein C-II Rabbit Polyclonal Antibody
description: Rabbit polyclonal antibody against apolipoprotein C-II for western blot and IHC.
